info.title: Wahy API
info.description: Wahy is a Quran Study Management System for a sheikh to manage students, lessons, billing, and analytics with offline-first sync.

post.description: Create the initial sheikh admin account. Only allowed when no sheikh exists.
Sign in as the sheikh admin and set auth cookies.
Register a student account in pending status and set auth cookies.
Sign in as a student and set auth cookies.
Rotate refresh token and issue a new access token using the HTTP-only refresh cookie.
Invalidate refresh token, clear auth cookies, and bump auth version when applicable.

get.description: Get the current student's profile and registration status.
List all students for the current sheikh.

schema.title: Response List All Api V1 Students Get

post.description: Create a new student under the current sheikh.

get.description: Fetch a student by id for the current sheikh.
List schedules for the current approved student.

schema.title: Response List My Schedule Api V1 Schedules Me Get

get.description: List all schedules for the sheikh.

schema.title: Response List All Api V1 Schedules Get

post.description: Create a new schedule for a student.

get.description: List schedules for a specific student.

schema.title: Response List For Student Api V1 Schedules Student  Student Id  Get

get.description: List lessons for the current approved student.

schema.title: Response List My Lessons Api V1 Lessons Me Get

get.description: Fetch a lesson by id for the current student.
List lessons for the sheikh with optional student filter.

schema.title: Response List All Api V1 Lessons Get

post.description: Record a new lesson for a student.

get.description: Fetch a lesson by id for the sheikh.

patch.description: Update lesson details for a student.

get.description: List invoices for the current approved student.

schema.title: Response List My Invoices Api V1 Invoices Me Get

get.description: Fetch an invoice by id for the current student.
Download the invoice PDF for the current student.

post.description: Generate a new invoice for a student and period.

get.description: List invoices with optional student filter.

schema.title: Response List All Api V1 Invoices Get

get.description: Fetch an invoice by id for the sheikh.

post.description: Override billable status for an invoice item.

get.description: Download or generate the invoice PDF.
List all active library items for the sheikh.

schema.title: Response List All Api V1 Library Get

post.description: Create a new library item and optional student access.

get.description: List library items available to the current student.

schema.title: Response List My Library Api V1 Library Me Get

get.description: Fetch a library item by id for the sheikh.

delete.description: Deactivate a library item by id.

get.description: Fetch a library item available to the current student.
Return attendance KPIs for a date range. Defaults to the last 30 days when no range is provided.
Return performance KPIs (pass rate, attendance rate, homework rate, timeliness, determination score) for a date range.
Return revenue KPIs and per-student revenue for a date range, including invoice counts and overdue counts.
Return operational KPIs (new registrations, active students, lessons recorded) for a date range.

post.description: Apply offline mutations with idempotency keys and return per-item status. Conflicts return HTTP 409 with both server and client payloads.

get.description: Return activity log changes since an optional timestamp for offline clients to reconcile state.

post.description: Acknowledge processed sync queue entries by id.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional description for the library item.

student_ids.title: Student Ids
student_ids.description: Optional list of student IDs. Required when access_level is specific_students.

payment_reference.title: Payment Reference
payment_reference.description: Optional payment reference or transaction ID.

effective_until.title: Effective Until
effective_until.description: Optional end date for the schedule.

special_notes.title: Special Notes
special_notes.description: Optional notes visible to the student.

special_notes.title: Special Notes
special_notes.description: Optional notes visible to the student update.

entity_id.title: Entity Id
entity_id.description: Optional entity id for update operations.

error_message.title: Error Message
error_message.description: Optional error message when status is error or conflict.

conflict.title: Conflict
conflict.description: Optional conflict payload with server/client versions.

tags.name: auth
tags.description: Authentication, session management, and token refresh.

tags.name: students
tags.description: Student registration, approval, and profile management.

tags.name: schedules
tags.description: Recurring lesson schedules and time windows.

tags.name: library
tags.description: Learning materials and student access controls.

tags.name: analytics
tags.description: Operational, attendance, performance, and financial KPIs.

tags.name: sync
tags.description: Offline queue sync and conflict handling.
